source: TBD — paper authors (insert citation when populated)
methodology_note: Numbers cited from original paper Table N (insert exact reference). Cells marked 'note: not tested in original paper' indicate benchmarks the original SmartShot evaluation did not cover; do not interpret as a detection failure.
_instructions_for_filling: 1. Locate the SmartShot paper (e.g. arXiv / IEEE / ACM)
2. Find Table N reporting baseline detection per benchmark
3. For each of our 12 benchmarks: if covered, set detected (true/false), tte_seconds (median), tte_std (std). If not covered, leave detected = null and add 'not tested in original paper' to note.
